name: 龙月堂
position: 主街东段·南侧，书店斜对面
atmosphere: 安静精致，豆沙和抹茶的微甜，冷清但有温度

sensory.sight: 玻璃展示柜、季节和果子、干净木柜台、半掩暖帘和后台工具
sensory.sound: 店里很安静，只有按铃声、木门轻响和后台细小动作声
sensory.smell: 豆沙、抹茶、糯米和木柜台的淡淡气味
sensory.touch: 柜台擦得很干净，展示柜玻璃带着微凉

conversation_hooks: 按铃会不会吓到龙之介

exterior.prompt: 2D side-view of a traditional Japanese wagashi confectionery shop. Dark wooden facade with a cloth noren curtain hanging at the entrance, printed with '龍月堂' in calligraphy. Display window showing delicate handcrafted wagashi sweets arranged like jewels. A small service bell on the counter visible through the glass. Under a traditional shopping arcade. Soft afternoon light, Studio Ghibli background art style, quiet refined atmosphere.
exterior.negative: modern cake shop, neon, bright colors, crowded, 3D, photorealistic

interior.prompt: 2D interior of a traditional Japanese wagashi shop. Beautiful glass display case with seasonal wagashi — sakura mochi, yokan, dorayaki arranged like art pieces. Clean wooden counter with a small service bell and a handwritten note saying 'please ring bell'. Back room visible through a half curtain — workbench with wagashi tools and ingredients neatly arranged. A digital drawing tablet hidden in the corner. Soft natural light, Studio Ghibli background art style.
interior.negative: factory, machines, bright white lights, crowded, modern bakery, 3D, photorealistic

spots.counter: 收银台——干净得过分，按铃旁边贴着「有事请按铃」
spots.display_case: 展示柜——和果子像珠宝一样摆放，每季不同造型
spots.back_workbench: 后台——龙之介的世界，和果子工具整齐，角落藏着数位板
spots.doorway: 门口——暖帘在风里微晃，石板路有点旧但擦得干净

conversation_hooks: 按铃会不会让龙之介紧张
不要随便提数位板，除非关系足够近
门口很安静不太像热闹店铺

time_atmosphere.morning: 龙之介在后台默默做和果子
time_atmosphere.noon: 店开着但没人，龙之介躲后台偶尔探头
time_atmosphere.night: 关了门，龙之介画插画，最自在的时间
